close_reason: Completed: Commit proxy now starts with minimal params (epoch, sequencer, resolver_layout). TSL removed, routing_data returned from finalize_batch, metadata field removed from State. All tests pass.
description:
Remove full TSL from commit proxy startup. Proxy needs only: epoch, sequencer, resolver_layout.

## Key Insight: Pipeline Order Makes This Work

```
resolve_conflicts → apply_mutations → prepare_for_logging → push_to_logs
                    ↑                  ↑                     ↑
                    populates          uses routing_data     uses routing_data
                    routing_data       (just updated!)       .log_services
```

`apply_mutations` runs BEFORE routing/pushing, so metadata populates routing before it's needed.

## Bootstrap Strategy: "Eat Our Own Dogfood"

First transaction from Director writes all system keys. Resolver returns these as
metadata mutations. RoutingData.apply_mutations processes them, populating:
- shard_table (from shard_key mutations)
- log_map (from layout_log mutations)
- log_services (from layout_log mutations)

By the time routing happens, routing_data has everything needed.

## Consolidated RoutingData

All routing info lives in one struct:
```elixir
%RoutingData{
  shard_table: ets_table,      # key → tag
  log_map: %{0 => "log-1"},    # index → log_id
  log_services: %{"log-1" => {:log_1, :node}},  # log_id → how to reach
  replication_factor: 3
}
```

MetadataMerge is folded into RoutingData.apply_mutations/2.

## Required Start Params

```elixir
%{
  epoch: epoch,
  sequencer: sequencer_pid,
  resolver_layout: resolver_layout
  # routing_data starts empty via new_empty/0
}
```

## Sub-tickets

1. bedrock-mrrk: RoutingData foundation (new_empty, insert_log, log_services field)
2. bedrock-22xb: Consolidate MetadataMerge into RoutingData
3. bedrock-yz03: State - remove TSL, add sequencer field
4. bedrock-rcos: Batching - use state.sequencer
5. bedrock-yml6: Finalization - remove TSL, use routing_data
6. bedrock-yqdo: Server - simplify startup
title: Minimal commit proxy startup: epoch, sequencer, resolver_layout only
